allow: PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(40\); do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5081/api/identity/login' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{}' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $up = $true } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $up = $true } else { $up = $false } } } until \($up -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); if \($up\) { 'API is up' } else { 'API did not start' })

PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if \($pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $pids -Force -Confirm:$false; "Stopped: $pids" } else { "Nothing listening" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(40\); do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5081/' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; $up = $true } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $up = $true } else { $up = $false } } } until \($up -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); if \($up\) { 'API is up' } else { 'API did not start' })
